what_works: One Rank Math JSON-LD block is present in the homepage head and uses https://schema.org.
The main brand entity exists as EducationalOrganization + Organization with a stable @id, URL, and logo.
WebSite schema includes publisher, inLanguage, and SearchAction.
WebPage schema is connected to the WebSite and Organization entities and includes publish and modified dates.
The Isfahan branch is represented as LocalBusiness with name, URL, telephone, email, parentOrganization, PostalAddress, areaServed, and sameAs.

findings.title: Tehran branch is not modeled as LocalBusiness
findings.description: The Tehran branch exists as https://zehnati.ir/#local-tehran, but its @type is EducationalOrganization rather than LocalBusiness or a relevant local subtype. It has address, phone, email, areaServed, and parentOrganization, but local-search systems do not get a clear local business entity for Tehran.
findings.recommendation: Change the Tehran branch node to LocalBusiness, or use an array such as ["EducationalOrganization", "LocalBusiness"] if both education and local branch identity are needed. Keep the existing @id and add local fields such as geo, openingHoursSpecification, priceRange, hasMap, and branch-specific sameAs links.

findings.title: Isfahan LocalBusiness is incomplete
findings.description: The Isfahan branch is correctly typed as LocalBusiness, but the node is still thin. It lacks geo coordinates, opening hours, priceRange, hasMap, postalCode, branch-specific page/map URL, and verified local profile links.
findings.recommendation: Enrich https://zehnati.ir/#local-isfahan with real GeoCoordinates, OpeningHoursSpecification, postalCode where available, priceRange, hasMap, and Google Business Profile or other verified citation URLs. Mirror the same NAP visibly on the page and contact/local landing pages.

findings.title: Person schema for Dr Zahra Jafari is missing
findings.description: The title and visible content reference دکتر زهرا جعفری, but the JSON-LD graph does not include a Person entity for her. This leaves the expert/founder entity disconnected from the organization and homepage.
findings.recommendation: Add a Person node for دکتر زهرا جعفری with a stable @id, name, jobTitle/role, worksFor or affiliation, knowsAbout, image, sameAs/profile URLs, and a relationship from the WebPage or Organization where accurate.

findings.title: Twitter author still exposes fish-programmer
findings.description: The homepage contains twitter:label1=نویسنده and twitter:data1=fish-programmer. This conflicts with the public brand/expert positioning around ذهن آتی and دکتر زهرا جعفری.
findings.recommendation: Update the WordPress/Rank Math author identity so Twitter card author data uses دکتر زهرا جعفری or a verified brand author. Also check Gravatar, byline, Article author settings, and any author archive metadata.

findings.title: No Service schema for consultation offer
findings.description: The homepage presents free کنکور consultation and lead-generation CTAs, but no Service schema describes the consultation offer, provider, service area, channel, or action target.
findings.recommendation: Add Service schema only after the visible copy clearly states the consultation service details. Connect it to the organization, Tehran/Isfahan branches, areaServed, and the existing consultation form or phone CTA.

findings.title: No BreadcrumbList schema
findings.description: No BreadcrumbList node was detected on the homepage. This is not critical for the homepage, but it should be consistent on deeper service, city, and article pages if visible breadcrumbs are used.
findings.recommendation: Add BreadcrumbList only where a visible breadcrumb trail exists, and keep item URLs absolute and canonical.
